Title: Stat Lockup Component
URL: https://swatkb.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DRUP/pages/20513089
Version: 3
---

The
Stat Lockup
component type is used to display a very specific combination of images and text. As a result, it is not as flexible as some of the other component types. This component can only be created and maintained by ITS administrators. To request the creation of
Stat Lockup
component on your site, email
support@swarthmore.edu
.
